case_title: N DAVID HOOVER et al VS. S JERRAL SCHWARTZMAN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION FOR ORDER CONTINUING ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER HOOVER, N DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL WELLS FARGO VAN KASPER,A DIVISION OF WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS,LLC HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT TO S. JERRAL SCHWARTZMAN FILED BY PETITIONER HOOVER, N DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER HOOVER, N DAVID AN INDIVIDUAL WELLS FARGO VAN KASPER,A DIVISION OF WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS,LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT SCHWARTZMAN, S JERRAL AN INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE OF THE SCHWARTZMAN FAMILY TRUST RESPONDENT S. JERRAL SCHWARTZMAN'S CLAIMS IN THE ARBITRATION ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; THE COURT CONFIRMS THE PANEL'S RECOMMENDATION THAT ALL REFERENCE TO THE ARBITRATION BE EXPUNGED FROM PETITIONER N. DAVID HOOVER'S REGISTRATION RECORDS MAINTAINED BY NASD CENTRAL REGISTRATION DEPOSITORY ("CRD"); EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS, INCLUDING ATTORNEY'S FEES; ALL OTHER RELIEF NOT EXPRESSLY GRANTED IS DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOC)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER N HOOVER, WELLS FARGO VAN KASPER,A DIVISION OF WELLS FARGO NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD RULING: NO ARGUMENT AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/PHA) ROBERT BALIAN # 5220
